raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I was notified by XXXX that there was unusual activity on my account. I called them immediately and after hours on the phone, being transferred from person to another, I was told that a transaction was made to a XXXX XXXX in the amount of {$2100.00}. I never Authorized or made any such transaction! I opened a case against this disputed amount with their Resolution Center. I immediately called my Credit Card Company and cancelled my credit card, told them that I had been hacked for that amount. I was issued a new card and have been trying to resolve this problem with both XXXX and Barclay Credit Card. My request for verification of what this transaction or services was for are being ignored. They state they have documentation provided by the merchant, but they have not shared that with me. 

In the meantime, I have done my own research and find that : on XXXX XXXX has an XXXX page in XXXX and I made a copy of that. This is pure hacking and I refuse to pay the Credit Card Company. They have now notified the XXXX XXXX XXXX which will effect my credit rating. I hope that you can help me find a resolution to this. Thank you.
